title: Hospice Care: MedlinePlus
text:
onals and volunteers provides it. They give medical, psychological, and spiritual support. The goal of the care is to help people who are dying have peace, comfort, and dignity. The caregivers try to control pain and other symptoms so a person can remain as alert and comfortable as possible. Hospice programs also provide services to support a patient's family. 
Usually, a hospice patient is expected to live 6 months or less. Hospice care can take place:
At home 
At a hospice center 
In a hospital 
In a skilled nursing facility 
NIH: National Cancer Institute
